text:
It's International Dog Day, and we celebrated with our furry friends from PALS (Pet Access League Society) and YYC International Airport! 🐶✈️ 

PALS is a volunteer pet visitation service that brings much-needed pet therapy to those who need it most. You can often find them hanging out by the departure gates at YYC Airport, so be sure to stop by, say hi, and enjoy your flight! 🛫🐾 

#YYC #Travel #WestJet #Internationaldogday

text:
Getting ready to pack your bags?  

🎒 Each guest gets to bring one carry-on and a personal item. But they've got to fit just right!   

🧳 Our carry-on magic numbers? 53 cm x 23 cm x 38 cm. That's the sweet spot for our overhead compartments – no cramming or squishing required!  

👜 And for your personal item, think compact: 41 cm x 15 cm x 33 cm. Perfect for sliding under the seat in front of you!  

Just like Crystal said, before you jet off on your next adventure, make sure your bags are sized for success. ✈️

text:
Don’t fall for scammers!

Your safety is not only our priority onboard, but online as well. We’ve seen an increase in fraudulent social media accounts impersonating WestJet and contacting guests. For your own safety, please be cautious when receiving messages from accounts disguised as WestJet on social media, especially when it’s not from our official platforms. #nowyouknow #westjet #official

text:
This year, we were proud to come together for the Western leg of Haul for Hope and for our continued partnership with Hope Air. Haul for Hope directly supports Hope Air’s mission to ensure Canadians have access to the medical care they need. Thank you to everyone who fundraised, tuned in and Hauled for Hope. 

Learn about how to support Hope Air https://support.hopeair.ca/haulforhope2024
